CustomField.label: Appointment
CustomField.description: Lookup to VS_Appointment__c: the appointment this notification relates to (e.g. booking confirmation, reminder, no-show follow-up). Lookup (not Master-Detail): notification-log retention (1 yr) is shorter than appointment (3 yr) and appointments may be reparented/cancelled independently. Nullable: not every notification is appointment-scoped (e.g. OTP-adjacent or generic alerts). deleteConstraint SetNull chosen so appointment deletion does not cascade-delete or block deletion of historical notification logs needed for SMS audit (Annexure C4).
